title: Finite Relations And Function Tables

solver_reuse.target: finite function single-valued QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Function-consistency conflict where f(x0) is forced to equal y0 and y1 while y0 != y1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-relation rows only when they add distinct equality, totality, or graph-consistency solver pressure; keep arbitrary relation algebra theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite relation predicates as deterministic Bool/BV formulas.
Replay finite function tables through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the QF_UF function-consistency artifact tied to a checked Alethe evidence regression.
Promote reusable finite-relation helpers only after cardinality or finite-algebra packs duplicate the same logic.
